name: coal-trading-erp-web
description: VK Trading ERP — web application (browser + shared server)

scripts.postinstall: cd backend && npm install && npx prisma generate && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n frontend,api -c cyan,green "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && npm install && npx prisma generate
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run start:server
scripts.start:server: cd backend && npm run db:migrate && npm run start:web
